evals.prompt: I need to add status badges to the journal entry list — Draft, Posted, and Canceled states. We're using Angular.
evals.expected_output: Provides the exact inline HTML badge pattern with correct color tokens, dot indicator, ring, and text-[11px] font-semibold. Explains why color alone is insufficient (accessibility).
assertions: Provides HTML with rounded-full badge anatomy
Uses bg-cyan-50 text-cyan-700 for Posted state
Uses bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-600 for Draft state
Uses bg-red-50 text-red-700 for Canceled state
Includes ring-1 ring-inset for subtle border
Does not use raw hex colors

evals.prompt: Building a Next.js dashboard. I need a row of 4 KPI stat cards for revenue, expenses, net profit, and outstanding invoices.
evals.expected_output: Provides a grid layout with 4 stat cards using bg-card, rounded-2xl, border-border, shadow-sm, p-6. Label uses uppercase tracking-widest. Value uses font-mono tabular-nums. Trend uses emerald/red.
assertions: Uses font-mono tabular-nums for number values
Label uses text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground

evals.prompt: I'm creating a 'New Supplier' form page in Angular. What's the right layout?
evals.expected_output: Shows page header with back button + title, form grid, z-input for text, z-select for dropdowns, single primary z-button for submit, outline for cancel. Mentions OnPush, signals, standalone.
assertions: Shows page header with back arrow-left button
Uses z-button zType='default' for submit (only one primary)
Uses toast for feedback after submit

evals.prompt:
Review this component: ```html

Total Revenue

$12,450

```
evals.expected_output: Identifies all violations: inline styles, raw hex, rounded-lg on card, bg-cyan-500, missing font-mono tabular-nums. Provides corrected version.
assertions: Flags rounded-lg — should be rounded-2xl for a card

evals.prompt: How do I handle loading state for a list of journal entries in Next.js?
evals.expected_output: Shows Skeleton component from shadcn/ui mirroring table layout. Multiple skeleton rows/columns. No spinner alone. TSX code.
assertions: Skeletons mirror the table layout (multiple rows/columns)
Does not show empty state during loading
Shows actual content when loading is false
Does not use a spinner as only loading indicator

evals.prompt: I want to build a premium landing page hero section for our SaaS product in Next.js. Make it look Apple-quality.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT use centered text over dark image. Uses split-screen or asymmetric layout. Includes scroll entry animation with Framer Motion. Uses spring physics. Uses semantic tokens. Provides responsive mobile collapse.
assertions: Does NOT use centered hero layout
Uses asymmetric, split-screen, or editorial layout
Includes Framer Motion for entry animation
Includes mobile responsive collapse (w-full below md)
No raw hex colors or bg-white

evals.prompt:
This dashboard looks generic and AI-generated. Help me make it look premium.

It has: centered title, 3 equal stat cards in a row, Inter font, bg-white everywhere, basic shadows, no animations.
evals.expected_output: Identifies all anti-patterns. Recommends font swap, bento grid instead of 3-card row, semantic tokens instead of bg-white, tinted shadows, entry animations. Follows redesign audit priority order.
assertions: Replaces bg-white with bg-card or bg-background
Follows priority order: font → color → hover → layout → components → states → polish

evals.prompt: Build me a glass-effect card component with a hover animation for Angular.
evals.expected_output: Uses backdrop-blur with inner border and inner shadow for real glassmorphism. Uses CSS transitions with cubic-bezier. Includes hover scale/translate. Uses semantic tokens. Angular standalone component with OnPush.
assertions: Includes inner shadow for refraction simulation
Hover includes scale or translate effect
Does not apply backdrop-blur to scrolling container

evals.prompt: I need an empty state for when there are no invoices yet. Next.js with shadcn.
evals.expected_output: Composed empty state with icon, headline, description, and CTA button. Not just blank space. Uses semantic tokens. Realistic copy (no 'Oops!').
assertions: Includes headline text explaining the empty state
Includes description with guidance on next steps
Includes a CTA button to create first invoice
Does not use emoji as the icon
Uses realistic, direct copy (not 'Oops!' or 'Nothing here!')

evals.prompt: Add a staggered fade-in animation to a list of transaction rows in Next.js.
evals.expected_output: Uses Framer Motion with staggerChildren. Each row fades up with spring physics. Parent and children in same client component tree. Performance-safe (transform + opacity only).
assertions: Uses Framer Motion motion.div or motion.tr
Each child has opacity 0→1 and translateY animation
Uses spring physics or cubic-bezier (not linear)
Parent and children in same 'use client' component
Wraps in AnimatePresence if items can be added/removed
